response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two songs being performed by Aki Rosenthal, Kureiji Ollie, and a staff character. 2. Identified '愛♡スクリーム!' from on-screen title. Used search query '愛♡スクリーム アキ・ローゼンタール lyrics'. 3. Identified 'イケナイ太陽' from on-screen text. Used search query 'イケナイ太陽 ORANGE RANGE lyrics'. 4. Found lyrics for both and structured into JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring vocal performances by VTubers Aki Rosenthal and Kureiji Ollie, along with a black-clad performer. The setlist consists of '愛♡スクリーム!' followed by 'イケナイ太陽'.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal, Kureiji Ollie, and a black-clad performer dance and sing '愛♡スクリーム!'. The performance features choreography and stage graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: キミにまつわる運命事情 今日は絶好調 ...そのはずでした過去形 天気予報 ド外れ ドア閉まるバス 憂鬱 Monday なんて不条理 文句 誰行き? Hah... 八つ当たりは問題外 どうしようもないコト 多すぎ Everyday 現実は手強い だけど試練の向こうへ ため息ついてここから 立ち上がれたらまた なにかが始まる Let's get it going now! going now! がむしゃら気味に どこへだって 繰り出して 胸張って楽しんじゃおう Up・Down Say everyone, going now! going now! 蹴散らしちゃえよ ああいう そういう 波乱万丈 大体の運命 変えてくのは自分だって ―――キミは知ってる 電車で割り込み コンビニで傘無くなった ジリジリ減っていってる ハートの残機 あとどれくらい? 辻褄合ってなくていい 悲劇の1秒先で 思いきり笑ったら いい日に格上げ! Let's get it going now! going now! 顔上げてほら ありのままのステップで 予測不能 未来へ踏み出して Say everyone, going now! going now! 吹き飛ばしちゃえ 冴えない 浮かない 顔した 今日なんて全部 自分だけがそう出来るって ―――キミは知ってる I will try it again! 分かってるはずさ I will try it again! ひらかれるはずさ 今はまだ遠い そんな景色 怖くても 眩しくても この手で掴めるまで... Let's get it going now! going now! がむしゃら気味に どこへだって 繰り出して 胸張って楽しんじゃおう Up・Down
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Fate circumstances related to you, today is in great shape ...that was supposed to be the case, past tense, weather forecast completely off, bus door closes, depressed Monday, what an absurdity, complaint, where is it going? Hah... taking it out on others is out of the question, there are too many things I can't do anything about, Everyday reality is tough, but beyond the trials, if I can stand up from here, something will start again. Let's get it going now! going now! recklessly, to wherever, let's go out and enjoy it with chests out. Up/Down Say everyone, going now! going now! Let's scatter it, this kind of thing, that kind of thing, ups and downs, I'm the one who changes most of fate -- you know it. Cutting in on the train, umbrella lost at the convenience store, the remaining lives of my heart are slowly decreasing, how much is left? It doesn't have to make sense, just one second ahead of the tragedy, if you laugh with all your might, it's an upgrade to a good day! Let's get it going now! going now! Lift your face, look, with the steps as they are, take a step into the unpredictable future, Say everyone, going now! going now! Blow it away, the dull, gloomy, faced day today, you can do it all yourself -- you know it. I will try it again! I know I should, I will try it again! I should be able to open it, even if the scenery is still far away, even if it's scary, even if it's dazzling, until I can grab it with these hands... Let's get it going now! going now! recklessly, to wherever, let's go out and enjoy it with chests out. Up/Down

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal, Kureiji Ollie, and a black-clad performer dance and sing 'イケナイ太陽'. The performance features choreography and stage graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: HOO イケナイ太陽 NA NA チョッとでいいから みせてくれないか お前のセクシー フェロモンで オレ メロメロ AHふれちゃいそう でも イケナイの! 徐々に高鸣る鼓动 とめられないわ 交わす言叶の 记忆远く 口元の动きに揺られ动く 濡れた 髪を 抚でた そして AH? ABC 続かない そんなんじゃ ダメじゃない だって ココロの奥は 违うんじゃない オレの青春 そんなもんじゃない 热く 奥で果てたいよ きっと キミじゃなぎゃ やだよ オレはイケナイ太陽 NA 赤い 糸なんて 絵空事 でも 下心でさえ 信じたいの 俺は正しい キミも正しい とにかく もう左右されないゼ 骗し骗され 胸うずく 下手な芝居が より盛り上げる夜 息が耳に触れた二人 AH ABC 続かない そんなんじゃ ダメじゃない だって ココロの奥は 违うんじゃない あたしの青春 そんなもんじゃない 热く 奥で果てたいよ きっと キミじゃなぎゃ やだよ あたし イケナイ太陽 NA 交わす言叶の 记忆远く 口元の动きに揺られ动く 濡れた 髪を 抚でた そして AH ABC 続かない そんなんじゃ ダメじゃない だって ココロの奥は 违うんぢゃない? オレの青春 そんなもんじゃない 热く 奥で果てたいよ きっと キミじゃなぎゃ やだよ オレはイケナイ太陽 络み合う糸は 君と俺を结ぶ赤い糸 NA
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: HOO Forbidden sun NA NA Just a little is fine, won't you show me? With your sexy pheromones, I'm melting AH, it seems like I might touch it, but it's forbidden! The heartbeat that gradually rises cannot be stopped. The memory of the words exchanged is far away, shaken and moved by the movement of the lips. I stroked the wet hair, and then AH? ABC, it doesn't continue, isn't that useless? Because the bottom of my heart is different, right? My youth isn't like that, I want to end up hot in the depths. You have to be the one, I hate it otherwise, I'm the forbidden sun NA. Red thread, even if it's just a painting, I want to believe even in ulterior motives. I'm right, you're right, anyway, I won't be swayed left or right. Being deceived and deceiving makes my chest ache, a clumsy acting makes the night even more exciting. The two whose breaths touched their ears AH. ABC, it doesn't continue, isn't that useless? Because the bottom of my heart is different, right? My youth isn't like that, I want to end up hot in the depths. You have to be the one, I hate it otherwise, I'm the forbidden sun NA. The memory of the words exchanged is far away, shaken and moved by the movement of the lips. I stroked the wet hair, and then AH. ABC, it doesn't continue, isn't that useless? Because the bottom of my heart is different, right? My youth isn't like that, I want to end up hot in the depths. You have to be the one, I hate it otherwise, I'm the forbidden sun. The intertwined thread is the red thread that connects you and me NA.
